title: quercus × megaleia
intro: Quercus × megaleia, also known as the 'Giant White Oak', is a rare hybrid tree that combines the characteristics of the English Oak (Quercus robur) and the Sessile Oak (Quercus petraea). The bark and leaves of Quercus × megaleia have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus × megaleia are thought to include reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function. Quercus × megaleia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional remedies such as salves and ointments.
